mapper.sql: id, api_id, owers_name, owers_tel, owers_id, vehicle_nationalit, vehicle_no, vehicle_color, data_type, vehicle_type, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
insert into car_info (id, api_id, owers_name, owers_tel, owers_id, vehicle_nationalit, vehicle_no, vehicle_color, data_type, vehicle_type, create_time, update_time ) values
( #{item.id}, #{item.apiId}, #{item.owersName}, #{item.owersTel}, #{item.owersId}, #{item.vehicleNationalit}, #{item.vehicleNo}, #{item.vehicleColor}, #{item.dataType}, #{item.vehicleType}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
on duplicate key update vehicle_no = values(vehicle_no), vehicle_color = values(vehicle_color), owers_name = values(owers_name), owers_tel = values(owers_tel), owers_id = values(owers_id), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = sysdate()
